Portfolio

Work that pulls its weight.

Seven recent launches — from accounting agencies to tea brands and kindergartens. Each project is shaped around the same job: make the offer clear, make the next step obvious, and give visitors enough proof to enquire.

Start a project → Back to home →
Live case previews Long Ieng Stayflow Paybit Tech Macau Travel StayFix Bunnytales Aunt.Li included
01

Long Ieng

Hong Kong / Accounting Consultancy
Accounting consultancy site

Long Ieng needed a calmer digital presence for clients looking at overseas expansion support. The page had to make a technical advisory service feel structured, trustworthy, and easy to enquire about.

Delivery summary

Advisory positioning and enquiry structure prepared for overseas expansion clients

Proof status

Current evidence: Live website, visible page structure, and delivered content scope.

Data status: Enquiry counts, analytics, and client quotes will only be published after client authorisation.

What we shaped

  • Clear advisory positioning
  • Hong Kong-focused credibility path
  • Direct enquiry structure
Visit website →
02

Macau World Travel

Macau / Travel Agency
Travel enquiry page

The travel agency needed a focused page that turned scattered service information into a clearer enquiry route. The result is calmer, more direct, and easier for customers to act on.

Delivery summary

Service-led page journey prepared for travel enquiries

Proof status

Current evidence: Live website, visible page structure, and delivered content scope.

Data status: Enquiry counts, analytics, and client quotes will only be published after client authorisation.

What we shaped

  • Service-led page journey
  • Macau travel visual direction
  • Lower-friction contact path
Visit website →
03

Stayflow Homestay

Malaysia / Airbnb Operations
Direct booking presentation

Stayflow needed to move from platform-only dependence to direct booking confidence. The site presents the property experience, check-in clarity, and contact route in a way guests can quickly trust.

Delivery summary

Property story and direct booking pathway prepared for guest confidence

Proof status

Current evidence: Live website, visible page structure, and delivered content scope.

Data status: Enquiry counts, analytics, and client quotes will only be published after client authorisation.

What we shaped

  • Booking confidence narrative
  • Hospitality-first hero video presentation
  • Guest enquiry pathway
Visit website →
04

Paybit Tech

Singapore / Finance Software
Clear product messaging

Paybit Tech needed a sharper way to explain a finance product without overwhelming visitors. The page simplifies the product story and makes the main value easier to understand at first glance.

Delivery summary

Finance product message hierarchy prepared for demo conversations

Proof status

Current evidence: Live website, visible page structure, and delivered content scope.

Data status: Enquiry counts, analytics, and client quotes will only be published after client authorisation.

What we shaped

  • Product message hierarchy
  • Singapore market presentation
  • Sharper conversion copy

05

StayFix Dispatch

Malaysia / Repair Dispatch
Streamlined dispatch

StayFix needed an intake flow that made repair requests easier to receive and route. The site turns messy customer details into a cleaner dispatch starting point.

Delivery summary

Repair request intake and follow-up structure prepared for dispatch teams

Proof status

Current evidence: Live website, visible page structure, and delivered content scope.

Data status: Enquiry counts, analytics, and client quotes will only be published after client authorisation.

What we shaped

  • Repair request intake path
  • Mobile-first customer form
  • Cleaner follow-up structure
Visit website →
06

Bunnytales

Malaysia / Early Childhood Education
Bilingual brand, clear trial bookings

Bunnytales needed to feel gentle, premium, and easy for parents to understand. The page supports a bilingual brand story and helps families move naturally toward a trial booking.

Delivery summary

Parent-friendly bilingual page prepared for trial booking enquiries

Proof status

Current evidence: Live website, visible page structure, and delivered content scope.

Data status: Enquiry counts, analytics, and client quotes will only be published after client authorisation.

What we shaped

  • Parent-friendly brand language
  • Bilingual service presentation
  • Trial booking call-to-action
Visit website →
07

Aunt.Li

Australia / Aged Citrus Peel Tea
Premium product storytelling

Aunt.Li needed a product page for an Australia-based Chinese tea brand, making aged citrus peel tea feel premium, calm, and gift-ready for a modern audience. The page presents the collection, product benefits, brewing ritual, and enquiry path in one clear brand experience.

Delivery summary

Premium product story prepared for gifting and sample enquiries

Proof status

Current evidence: Live website, visible page structure, and delivered content scope.

Data status: Enquiry counts, analytics, and client quotes will only be published after client authorisation.

What we shaped

  • Quiet luxury tea brand positioning
  • Product collection and gifting journey
  • Clear enquiry path for samples and gifting
Visit website →

Proof notes

How we show work without making things up.

What is public now?

Live websites, industry context, page structure, contact paths, and the visible scope of work we prepared.

What waits for approval?

Enquiry counts, analytics exports, revenue impact, and client quotes are only added after clear client authorisation.

Why this matters

It keeps the portfolio useful without inventing metrics. Stronger proof can be added later when the source is real.

Start a project.

Tell us what you need. No formal brief required — one clear conversation is enough to start.

WhatsApp → Email →
